name: Miglior Cat Can Veal & Carrots Pate 400g
description: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 50%, veal 5%, dehydrated carrots 4%, cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 10%, Crude fat 6%, Crude fibers 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: The product is ready to use. STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
